questions.question_text: CO Mapping Write the equation for gamma correction in an image. 1 Convolve and correlate the following vectors with each other. Also calculate the autocorrelation of vector B 𝐴= [0 0 0 1 0 0 0 0] 𝐵= [1 2 3 2 8] 1 Write the expression for two –dimensional Laplacian. What is its use in image processing? 2 What is the use of cumulative distribution function in digital image processing? 2 Write the expression for one dimensional Discrete Cosine Transform. 3 How is it advantageous to have a transformation kernel separable and symmetric? 3 Explain brightness adaptation of human eye with this diagram What is Entropy of an image? How is related to Shannon’s first theorem? 4 CO Mapping
